textTemplates.name: AgencyApprovalTemplate
textTemplates.text:
Dear Channel Partner, 

Congratulations!

 

We are pleased to inform you that your registration with Zoya Developments has been successfully completed. All submitted documents have been reviewed, verified, and approved.

 To proceed with the activation of your profile in our system, we kindly request you to sign the agreement sent to your registered signatory email at your earliest convenience.

 We are delighted to welcome you to Zoya Developments and look forward to a productive and long-term collaboration.

 Our team will be sharing upcoming project launches, inventory updates, pricing details, and all required marketing materials to support your success with Zoya.

 Should you require any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

 Welcome aboard—we look forward to achieving exceptional milestones together.

 

Warm regards,

Zoya Developments

Channel Relations Team

textTemplates.name: AgencyNMItemplate
textTemplates.text:
Dear Chanel Team,

 We hope you are doing well.

 As part of the partner registration process with Zoya Developments, we kindly request you to provide the remaining pending documents listed below, in order to complete your onboarding:

 Pending Documents:

{!Get_Agency_Onboarding_records.Pending_Documents__c}

(Please share the specific items you need, and I will fill them in.)

 Once we receive these documents, we will finalize your registration and activate your partner profile in our system.

 If you require any clarification or support, our team is here to assist you.

 We appreciate your prompt cooperation.

 Warm regards,

Zoya Developments

Partner Relations Team

textTemplates.name: CancelTemplate
textTemplates.text:
Dear Channel Partner,

We regret to inform you that your registration has been rejected due to {!$Record.Reason_For_Cancellation__c}.

You may submit a new registration request after addressing the reason mentioned above. Please ensure that all required information, supporting details and documents are accurately provided during re-submission.

If you have any questions or need further clarification, feel free to contact us.

Best regards,

ZOYA DEVELOPMENTS

CHANNEL RELATIONS TEAM

textTemplates.name: EOIComplete
textTemplates.text:
The Finance team has successfully completed the task "Receipt Verification" and verified the Sales Booking / EOI {!Get_EOI_Records.Name}".

All required details and documents have been reviewed and confirmed. 

You may proceed with the next steps as per the process.

textTemplates.name: NMIemail
textTemplates.text:
The Task subject {!$Record.Subject} related to Sales Booking/EOI Name {!Get_EOI_Records.Name} for Project name {!Get_EOI_Records.Project_Name__r.Name} has been reassigned because some required details/ documents are missing.


Please provide the necessary information / documents to proceed.

textTemplates.name: SalestoFinance
textTemplates.text:
The task “EOI Verification”, related to Sales Booking / EOI {!Get_EOI_Records.Name}, has been assigned from the Sales Admin to the Finance team as “Receipt Verification” after completion by the After Sales Admin.

Please review and verify the EOI record for complete details and proceed accordingly.

If any additional information or documents are required, kindly coordinate with the Sales team.
